titleStmt.title: Transcription and Translation of DCA DCD Misc. Ch. 734a

availability.p: Status unknown. Exported for research and migration workflows.

revisionDesc.change: transcription moa=976 status=reviewed modified=2022-11-01 11:12:45.959684+00 | translation moa=977 status=reviewed modified=2022-11-01 11:12:45.923693+00

p.cl: Omnibus Christi fidelibus ad quos presens Scriptum peruenerit . P . filius . Com . P . de Dunbar Salutem .

Noueritis me anno incarnationis domini . m . cc . xxxi . in vigilia sancti Thome martiris Recepisse a
priore de Coldingham et Conuentu . quadraginta marcas sterlingorum de ducentis marcis quas
mihi debebant pro quieta clamatione mea eisdem facta de dominio et villa de Swynewde cum
omnibus pertinentiis suis quas quidem quadraginta marcas mihi debebant reddere ad festum
purificationis anni prenominati .
Et in huius rei testimonium presenti scripto sigillum meum apposui .
To all Christ's faithful to whom the present writing shall have come, Patrick son of Earl Patrick of Dunbar sends greeting.

Know me in the year of the Incarnation 1231, on the vigil of Saint Thomas the martyr, to have received from the prior of Coldingham and the convent, forty merks of sterling of the two hundred merks which they owed me in return for my quitclaim made to the same of the demesne and toun of Swinewood with all its pertinents; and they were bound to pay these forty merks to me at the feast of the purification of the aforenamed year.
And as testimony of this matter I have applied my seal to the present writing.
